programme.title: Celebrity Homes Unlocked
programme.desc: Andrea goes to Nashville to spend a day with Brad Rempel, lead singer of country music sensation High Valley.

programme.title: Celebrity Homes Unlocked
programme.sub-title: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
programme.desc: Andrea lands in Upstate New York for pancakes, ping pong and plenty of fun with Nigel Barker.

programme.title: Celebrity Homes Unlocked
programme.desc: Andrea heads to Hollywood for smoothies and trivia with American Ninja Warrior's Matt Iseman.

programme.title: Celebrity Homes Unlocked
programme.desc: Andrea’s off to Huntington Beach, California to spend the day with Cassie Randolph.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.

programme.title: Epic Destinations
programme.sub-title: Living It Up in Los Cabos

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.

programme.sub-title: Skylar & Tyler's Blank Bungalow / Melissa's Galley Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Anne-Marie Barton offers homeowners a transformation that will change their spaces and their lives.

programme.sub-title: Laura's Outdoor Dreamscape / Julie's Reclaimed Refuge

programme.sub-title: Rachel & Kevin's Mid-Century Remodel / Rachel & Tanner's Really Great Room

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.desc: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
programme.desc: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
programme.desc: Charli and Kylie transform Irene’s closet and turn her bedroom into a beautiful retreat.

programme.title: Design Science
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch takes on the science of transforming spaces.

programme.title: Design Science
programme.sub-title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Design Science
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch breaks down the basic formulas for successful design.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: The Finn's are heading to the Texas backcountry to build their dream home off the grid.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: With Builder Gary’s help, Leah’s hoping to get this house back on track.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: The mortar on the exterior stone is finally dry, but hasn’t turned out at all like Leah envisioned.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Year
programme.desc: Leah focuses on interior selections, but choosing paint colors proves to be more difficult than she thought.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: With the end of the project in sight, everyone’s working hard to make sure the Finn's make their move-in date!

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.desc: Leah’s heard that the last 10% of the build takes 90% of the effort … and it couldn’t be more true.

programme.title: Sort It Out
programme.sub-title: Calming the Kids' Room & Out of Office
programme.desc: The Home Sort sisters transform spaces from chaos to clutter-free.

programme.desc: The Home Sort sisters transform spaces from chaos to clutter-free.

programme.title: Sort It Out
programme.desc: The Home Sort sisters transform spaces from chaos to clutter-free.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.desc: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
programme.desc: Jillian explores some of the most whimsical homes in Southern California.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.desc: Matthew meets trailblazers Matthew McIvor of Proudly Serving and the King of Babka, Shimi Aaron.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala
programme.desc: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Before taking the class on a much-needed field trip, Brad and Jennifer drop in to check each flipper's progress.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Graduation looms near, and the flippers are hard at work putting the finishing touches on each home.
